title: OpenAI ships ChatGPT Work, its long-teased agent for finishing entire jobs
subtitle: The GPT-5.6 rollout came paired with a new agent that runs multi-hour tasks across Slack, Gmail, Salesforce, and Google Drive — OpenAI's clearest bid yet to turn ChatGPT into a workplace super app.
author: AESOP AI Engine
body: OpenAI launched ChatGPT Work on July 9, 2026, an agent inside ChatGPT that runs multi-step tasks across a user's files and connected apps and can spend hours on a single project before returning a finished deliverable. The launch is powered by GPT-5.6, the new frontier model OpenAI released the same day, and rolls out first to Pro, Enterprise, and Edu subscribers on web and mobile, with Plus and Business tiers following in the coming days. The desktop app is available immediately for all plans, including the free tier.

The centerpiece is a Unified Plugins Directory that pulls third-party integrations into one interface. At launch it includes Google Drive, SharePoint, Slack, Microsoft Teams, Gmail, Outlook, Salesforce, Adobe, Zoom, LinkedIn, GitHub, Canva, and Dropbox. ChatGPT can decide which plugin to reach for on its own, or the user can invoke a specific one with an @-mention. Task scheduling ships alongside it, so a user can hand off work from a phone in the morning and pick up the finished result later.

This is the first concrete step toward the desktop 'super app' OpenAI has been signaling since March, which the company has said will fold together ChatGPT, its Codex coding agent, and its Atlas web browser. It also lands as a direct counter to Anthropic's Claude Cowork — the agent Anthropic launched in January for the same category of long-running knowledge work — which itself moved to mobile and web on July 8. The two products are now competing head-to-head for the same enterprise buyers.

For learners: the shift here is from chat to delegation. A model that answers your question is a tool; a model that owns a task for hours and hands back a finished spreadsheet is a coworker. The skills that matter change accordingly — writing a clear prompt matters less than writing a clear brief, connecting the right data sources, and reviewing work critically when it comes back. Practice reading agent output the way you would read a junior colleague's draft: check the reasoning, check the sources, and never ship what you have not verified.

sources.title: OpenAI launches ChatGPT Work agent to handle complex tasks — Bloomberg
OpenAI unveils long-awaited 'Super App' as rivalry with Anthropic intensifies — U.S. News / Reuters
OpenAI pairs its GPT-5.6 public rollout with ChatGPT Work — The Decoder
